name: ceratops_artifact_nondeterministic_contract
description: Artifact checks that require AI-agent judgment, domain interpretation, current official documentation, or browser and registry-owner confirmation.

notes: Pass artifact identities with --param artifact_contracts=[...] when package, image, or registry identity cannot be derived from local manifests.
The evidence payload includes detected artifact types, release metadata, local signals, and available registry metadata.

review_result_values.pass: AI-agent review found the intent satisfied and recorded evidence.
review_result_values.fail: AI-agent review found a concrete mismatch.
review_result_values.approved_drift: The mismatch is allowed by the deterministic contract's approved drift profile.
review_result_values.blocked: Review needs unavailable permission, paid functionality, registry access, artifact access, or a product decision.
review_result_values.not_applicable: The artifact type or source does not apply.

checks.applies_when: The repository has artifact signals, the current change affects a releasable artifact, or an artifact or no-artifact claim is planned.
checks.review_required: Confirm the artifact contract should run and identify which claim or change triggered it.

checks.applies_when: Any artifact detector matches, or no-artifact is claimed.
checks.review_required: Confirm the real deliverable from project intent, README, release workflow, registry state, and user-facing documentation instead of relying only on manifests.

checks.applies_when: Any external artifact exists or is planned.
checks.review_required: Confirm artifact name, registry coordinates, version source, release policy, tag style, changelog source, and post-publish consumer check describe the actual external contract.

checks.applies_when: Audit-only mode is active.
checks.review_required: Confirm the workflow stays in classify and report mode and does not mutate tags, releases, packages, registry state, credentials, or package ownership.

checks.applies_when: A build, package, install, pull, run, or consume check is required.
checks.review_required: Confirm local and registry smoke checks exercise the real consumer path instead of only an editable checkout or local build cache.

checks.applies_when: Publishing, tagging, release creation, or package upload is proposed.
checks.review_required: Confirm repository policy and the merged change actually require a public or private artifact release before registry mutation.

checks.applies_when: Any artifact version or release tag is derived.
checks.review_required: Confirm the version source and tag style fit the ecosystem, repository policy, and existing release history.

checks.applies_when: A live registry, release, digest, package, or documentation endpoint is checked.
checks.review_required: Confirm the endpoint is authoritative for the selected artifact, visibility, and registry target.

checks.applies_when: A publish workflow exists.
checks.review_required: Confirm trusted publishing, OIDC, or another short-lived identity path is supported by the registry; otherwise confirm token fallback is explicit and minimally scoped.

checks.applies_when: Attestations, provenance, SBOM, or linked artifact metadata are emitted or claimed.
checks.review_required: Confirm provenance verification uses GitHub or registry-specific tooling and emitted metadata does not expose secrets or misleading build data.

checks.applies_when: A PyPI or Python package artifact is in scope.
checks.review_required: Confirm rendering, license metadata, Python support, distribution choices, trusted publishing, exact-version installation, and attestation verification fit the package.

checks.applies_when: An npm package artifact is in scope.
checks.review_required: Confirm package contents, access mode, scope, dist-tag policy, trusted publishing, approval path, provenance, build path, and consumer installation fit the package.

checks.applies_when: A Docker or OCI image artifact is in scope.
checks.review_required: Confirm image target, tags, base-image strategy, build context, multi-stage use, non-root practicality, ports, health checks, smoke run, provenance, and SBOM policy fit the image.

checks.applies_when: A Maven or Gradle-published artifact is in scope.
checks.review_required: Confirm coordinates, namespace ownership, signing, source and documentation expectations, portal behavior, and consumer resolution fit the artifact.

checks.applies_when: A NuGet package artifact is in scope.
checks.review_required: Confirm package ID, metadata, README, license, repository and source-link expectations, trusted publishing, push path, and consumer installation fit the package.

checks.applies_when: A crates.io or Cargo artifact is in scope.
checks.review_required: Confirm crate metadata, publish restrictions, documentation expectations, package contents, dry-run evidence, and consumer installation fit the crate.

checks.applies_when: A RubyGems artifact is in scope.
checks.review_required: Confirm gemspec metadata, gem contents, trusted publishing, build and push path, and consumer installation fit the gem.

checks.applies_when: A PowerShell Gallery module or script is in scope.
checks.review_required: Confirm manifest metadata, tags, license and project links, validation, publish path, and consumer installation or import fit the artifact.

checks.applies_when: GitHub Packages or GHCR is the registry.
checks.review_required: Confirm package linkage, access control, visibility, billing implications, and token choice match the intended package use.

checks.applies_when: GitHub release assets, binaries, archives, installers, or CLI binaries are in scope.
checks.review_required: Confirm asset naming, checksums, release notes, prerelease or draft state, platform matrix, download path, and install or run smoke check are meaningful.

checks.applies_when: A GitHub Pages or static documentation site artifact is in scope.
checks.review_required: Confirm the site is a real deliverable, the live URL and homepage are correct, navigation checks are meaningful, and stale published documentation is classified.

checks.applies_when: A Terraform module or Helm chart artifact is in scope.
checks.review_required: Confirm registry target, module or chart metadata, versioning, package and lint evidence, and consumer installation or pull fit the module.

checks.applies_when: Registry availability, trusted publishing, provenance, or paid and free behavior affects the result.
checks.review_required: Recheck official GitHub or registry documentation before deciding drift.
